description: Sinao is a French online invoicing and accounting platform for businesses. It handles sales documents, purchases, banking, contacts, and accounting workflows, with API access to the same features available in the web application.
summary: Sinao exposes one documented REST HTTP API at `https://api.sinao.app/v1` with an OpenAPI spec, authenticated either by a user bearer token or an application API key; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced.
